case_title: SOARING CAPITAL LLC VS. GIOVANNI J HERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOARING CAPITAL LLC
